prompt:
A pixel-perfect dark-themed settings panel UI screenshot for a desktop image management app. Tokyo Night dark theme. Background #08080c, surfaces #0c0c12, borders #1a1a2e, text #e0e0e0 in monospace font.

The panel title says "Privacy & Data" at the top.

DATA FLOW STATUS section shows a clean table with 4 columns: Feature, Status, Server, Data Sent.
Rows with colored circle indicators:
Row 1: "CLIP embeddings" - green circle "Local" - dash - "Nothing"
Row 2: "Object detection" - green circle "Local" - dash - "Nothing"
Row 3: "Ollama vision" - green circle "Local" - "localhost" - "Images"
Row 4: "Gemini embeddings" - red circle "Active" - "US" - "Images + key"
Row 5: "OpenAI generation" - yellow circle "Configured" - "US" - "Prompts + images"
Row 6: "OpenRouter" - gray circle "No key" - "US" - "Prompts + images"
Row 7: "MCP local" - green circle "Active" - "localhost" - "Metadata"
Row 8: "MCP HTTP" - gray circle "Off" - "network" - "Metadata"

Below the table: "API Call History" section header with a down arrow. Shows a list of recent API calls:
First entry is expanded with details showing endpoint, data sent description, model name, jurisdiction "US - Google LLC", and a ToS link. 
Three more entries below it are collapsed, showing just timestamp, provider name, data size, and a green checkmark.

At bottom: three collapsed sections with right arrows: "What could leave this machine", "Jurisdiction summary", "Export audit log"

Style: clean developer UI, no decorations, subtle dark borders, monospace text, colored dot indicators (green #9ece6a, red #f7768e, yellow #e0af68, blue #7aa2f7, gray #565a7a)
